metadata.name: Ocean's Emotions #149
metadata.description:
explore various emotions of a broken ocean.
press <space> to view in motion.
Mouse can be used to look around.

metadata.name: Bits Balanced #199
metadata.description:
Mathematically balanced structures inspired by pixel art.

Features:
1 - Toggle Border
S - Save

Query Parameters:
grain=false - turns off grain texture
resolution=2048 - sets resolution
frame=false - turns frame off

Credit:
Thanks to @Estienne_ca for the grainy texture algorithm

metadata.name: Balanced #110
metadata.description:
What does balance look like when viewed through the lens of pure mathematics? This is the question Balanced attempts to answer.

Each output is composed of a unique collection of blocks mathematically stacked to be in perfect balance.

This is my Genesis project. Enjoy!

Interactions:
1 - Reverse your stack vertically and re-balance.
2 - Toggle between square and portrait frame.
3 - Show center of mass. 
4 - Toggle the border.
5 - Toggle the background (color/transparent)
6 - Export image (2048x2048)
7 - Export image (4096x4096)
8 - Export image (8192x8192)

How it was made: https://www.jeffweber.art/balanced

metadata.name: Equanimity #161
metadata.description: Equanimity shows the algorithm in its search for balance in color and composition. All mints eventually converge to a stable state. If this takes longer than 40 seconds, the captured thumbnail will be different from the final result. Implemented in 5773 hand-crafted characters of JS code. Forever limited to 496 unique editions living on the Tezos blockchain. London - December 2021.
